iSpy City Explorer
Every ride, an adventure
From passive travel
to curious exploring
Every journey,
a new route to explore
Real neighbourhoods. Real landmarks. Pick a trail — cafes, schools, heritage stops & more.
Choose your quest
Every route shows you the missions, the max points up for grabs, and a big friendly "Let's Go!"
On foot or on wheels,
unlock the map
Live GPS tracks you on a real Google map. Spots stay locked until you're actually there.
Get close,
it comes alive
Within range, the spot unlocks with a real photo — so you know exactly what to look for.
Learn a story,
answer & earn
Every stop drops a fun local fact, then a quick true-or-false to lock in your points.
Clear every spot,
complete the route
Watch your trail turn green as you go — every stop banks points and a fact to remember.
Confetti, points
& new badges
Finish a route and celebrate — badges, a points tally, and bragging rights.
i-spy.in
Explore your city like never before
Let's Go! 🚀
